nasb.text: He who walks blamelessly will be delivered, But he who is crooked will fall all at once.

esv.text: Whoever walks in integrity will be delivered, but he who is crooked in his ways will suddenly fall.

cnv.text: 行為完全的，必蒙拯救； 行事狡詐的，必立刻跌倒。

ccb.text: 纯全无过的必蒙拯救， 行为邪僻的转眼灭亡。

csbs.text: 行事纯全的，必得到拯救； 道路歪邪的，瞬间就仆倒。
